title: corrigiola telephiifolia var. foliosa
intro: Corrigiola telephiifolia var. foliosa, commonly known as the Desert Smoke Bush, is a plant species that belongs to the Madder family (Madderaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The therapeutic actions of Corrigiola telephiifolia var. foliosa include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins.
